title: Twin created
narration: BEL starts with a digital twin of a complex defence electronics system.

title: Telemetry active
narration: Live synthetic telemetry streams into the twin.
value: Operational state connected to engineering models

title: Scenario triggered
narration: A mission scenario is triggered from the scenario engine.

title: Multiphysics impact
narration: Thermal, structural, RF and EO surrogate models calculate system impact.
value: ROM-ready platform extensible to high-fidelity solvers

title: Predict before failure
narration: The platform predicts risk before physical failure.

title: What-if mitigation
narration: Operator runs what-if mitigation and operating envelope changes.
value: Decision support without exposing classified tactics

title: Evidence captured
narration: The digital thread captures evidence and feeds design improvement.

title: BEL autonomy
narration: BEL retains source ownership, auditability and on-prem autonomy.
